title: Father's Amulet
paragraphs: Before my first exam at the Academy, Father offered me his amulet, saying it had helped him pass his exams and would do the same for me. I refused. I was a Baptist then, and to me, an amulet was pure paganism. With my head held high, I 'withstood the devil's temptation.' Then, Father was gone... And now, it remains the most shameful act of my life. I rejected my father's love for the sake of a dogma.
